pub struct Endpoint<'r, const ROLE: u8, K, Mint = crate::control::cap::mint::MintConfig, B = crate::binding::NoBinding> where K: carrier::SessionKitFamily + 'r, Mint: crate::control::cap::mint::MintConfigMarker, B: crate::binding::BindingSlot, {
pub struct RouteBranch<'r, const ROLE: u8, K, Mint = crate::control::cap::mint::MintConfig, B = crate::binding::NoBinding> where K: carrier::SessionKitFamily + 'r, Mint: crate::control::cap::mint::MintConfigMarker, B: crate::binding::BindingSlot, {
pub fn flow<M>(self) -> SendResult<flow::Flow<'r, ROLE, M, crate::substrate::SessionKit<'cfg, T, U, C, MAX_RV>, Mint, B>> where M: crate::global::MessageSpec + crate::global::SendableLabel, 'cfg: 'r, {
pub async fn recv<M>(self) -> RecvResult<(Self, M::Payload)> where M: crate::global::MessageSpec, M::Payload: crate::transport::wire::WireDecodeOwned, {
pub async fn offer(self) -> RecvResult<RouteBranch<'r, ROLE, crate::substrate::SessionKit<'cfg, T, U, C, MAX_RV>, Mint, B>> {
pub fn label(&self) -> u8 {
pub fn into_endpoint(self) -> Endpoint<'r, ROLE, crate::substrate::SessionKit<'cfg, T, U, C, MAX_RV>, Mint, B> {
pub async fn decode<M>(self) -> RecvResult<(Endpoint<'r, ROLE, crate::substrate::SessionKit<'cfg, T, U, C, MAX_RV>, Mint, B>, M::Payload)> where M: crate::global::MessageSpec, M::Payload: crate::transport::wire::WireDecodeOwned, {
pub enum SendError {
pub enum RecvError {
pub type SendResult<T> = core::result::Result<T, SendError>;
pub type RecvResult<T> = core::result::Result<T, RecvError>;
